channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Afreximbank funds Shoreline's Algerian oilfield project
item.description: Afreximbank has approved a $200 million loan to support Shoreline Power Company and its Italian subsidiary Arkad S.p.A. in executing a major oilfield project in Algeria. This financing will enable the...

item.title: PM Appoints Gen Aamer Raza as National Strategic Command Commander
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has appointed General Aamer Raza as the Commander of the National Strategic Command, promoting him from Lieutenant General to Four-Star General. This appointment comes un...

item.title: Alexa and Gelo Continue Their Chemistry in 'The Chambermaid's Daughter' Season 2
item.description: The Chambermaid's Daughter Season 2, starring Alexa Ilacad and Gelo Rivera, is set to captivate audiences with its compelling storyline and the actors' enduring chemistry. The series, produced by ABS-...

item.title: Sault Man Arrested Twice in 12 Hours for Same Victim
item.description: A man from Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario, was arrested twice within a 12-hour period for allegedly targeting the same victim. The incidents occurred on July 23, 2026, with the first arrest made at 8:08 PM...

item.title: Johnson Apologizes for Mischaracterizing Mokwele's Qualifications in SAPS Post Dispute
item.description: Investigating Directorate Against Corruption (Idac) head Andrea Johnson has retracted her claim that Brig Dineo Mokwele was unqualified for a senior SAPS post after reviewing her files. The admission ...

item.title: Pauline Hanson Faces Criticism for Downplaying Domestic Violence Comments
item.description: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson has faced intense criticism from domestic violence experts and advocates after her comments about domestic violence being a 'two-way street' were widely condemned. Han...

item.title: Senators Criticize Duale's Tribal Remarks, Demand Formal Senate Motion
item.description: Three Kenyan senators have criticized Health Cabinet Secretary Aden Duale over alleged remarks in a viral video that they claim risk inflaming ethnic tensions ahead of elections. The senators, includi...

item.title: JAMB and Borno State Collaborate on Mega CBT Centre for Education
item.description: Ishaq Oloyede, JAMB Registrar, commissioned a state-of-the-art CBT centre in Borno, funded by the state government. The facility, built on 5,300sqm, has 275 computers, 16 convenience facilities, and 5...

item.title: eThekwini Municipality Faces Water Crisis Amid Contractor Disputes and Service Disruptions
item.description: The eThekwini municipality is grappling with severe water service challenges, exacerbated by disputes between contractors and municipal officials. Contractors blocked access to a water services depot ...

item.title: Kilifi College Set to Start Classes for 1,000 Students in September
item.description: Ronald Ngala Utalii College in Kilifi is finally ready to start admitting students after a 10-year wait. The college, which focuses on tourism-related courses like catering, hotel management, and seaf...

item.title: Gen Z's viral memes and social media tactics reshape political protests
item.description: The article explores how Gen Z protesters in India are using memes, reels, and social media to redefine political expression during the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) protests. Young activists are blendi...

item.title: Wellness escapes in South Africa: 6 winter destinations for a mid-year reset
item.description: The article highlights six wellness destinations in South Africa ideal for a mid-year reset during winter. KwaShushu Hot Springs in KwaZulu-Natal offer natural mineral pools accessible only during the...

item.title: Tanzania boxers prepare for Commonwealth Games with team strengthening
item.description: Tanzania's boxing team is set to compete in the Commonwealth Games, marking a significant moment for the country's sports sector. The article highlights the team's readiness as they gear up for the ev...

item.title: Federal Govt Launches Housing Reforms with Stakeholder Involvement
item.description: The federal government has directed the Federal Mortgage Bank of Nigeria (FMBN) to allocate at least 40% of annual National Housing Fund (NHF) contributions towards mortgage financing, aiming to boost...

item.title: Commonwealth Games 2026: Key Events and Participation Details Announced
item.description: The Commonwealth Games 2026 schedule has been officially unveiled, marking a significant milestone in the preparations for the multi-sport event. The schedule outlines the dates and venues for various...

item.title: Fatal Collision on Hwy 401 Closes Westbound Lanes in London, Ont.
item.description: A fatal collision on Highway 401 in London, Ontario, has resulted in the closure of westbound lanes, causing significant traffic disruptions. The incident, which occurred on July 23, 2026, led to emer...

item.title: Ex-Agriculture Official Convicted in P50 Million Farm Aid Scandal
item.description: Janet Lim Napoles, former undersecretary of the Department of Agriculture (DAR), has been convicted of malversation for allegedly embezzling P50 million in non-existent farm inputs. The case, which wa...

item.title: Monkey found in laundry bag on London bus prompts £3,000 reward for information
item.description: A common marmoset monkey was discovered inside a laundry bag on a London bus, prompting a £3,000 reward for information leading to an arrest. The terrified animal, named Oyster, was found on a 302 bus...

item.title: Tax implications of high salaries and wealth perception
item.description: The article discusses a technical message from News Corp Australia regarding crawler bot detection. It explains that the website uses software to manage traffic from automated bots. Readers experienci...

item.title: Wildfire damages 20 properties near Clinton, B.C.
item.description: A wildfire burning northwest of Clinton, B.C., has damaged or destroyed buildings on about 20 properties, according to regional district director Kevin Skrepnek. The fire, which spans over 108 square ...
